title: melica nutans subsp. grandiflora
intro: Melica nutans subsp. grandiflora, also known as the tall melick, is a type of perennial grass native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce pain and inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of Melica nutans subsp. grandiflora include its ability to support immune function, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation. Traditionally, herbal preparations of Melica nutans subsp. grandiflora include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
